title: Rate Limiter Configuration
description: Global settings for the rate limiter plugin. Rules are managed via the UI.

fail_open.title: Fail Open
fail_open.description: If true, allow requests when storage is unavailable. If false, reject with 503.

storage_backend.title: Storage Backend
storage_backend.description: Storage backend: 'kv' for plugin SDK KV store (single instance), 'redis' for distributed deployments.

redis_url.title: Redis URL
redis_url.description: Redis connection URL (only used when storage_backend is 'redis'). Example: redis://localhost:6379/0

window_size_seconds.title: Window Size (seconds)
window_size_seconds.description: Duration of the sliding window in seconds.
